description_long: This is a compact, single-engine military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a brown and light gray color scheme. The wings are mid-mounted and slightly swept back, featuring white insignia markings on both surfaces. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, providing visibility for a single pilot. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in matching brown with light gray tips. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all extended. The airplane displays military insignia and a number '6' on the nose, suggesting a historical or replica design.
description: A compact, brown military jet airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a forward enclosed cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. Marked with insignia and a number '6' on the nose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown fuselage, swept mid-mounted wings, forward cockpit, and tricycle landing gear with visible insignia and number '6' on the nose.
description_view_1: Rear-top view highlighting the full wingspan, tail configuration, and both main landing gear units beneath the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the cockpit, swept wings, and tail, with insignia and landing gear visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit canopy, wing sweep, and the arrangement of the landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated in the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
